case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS LLC, LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. NIGHT MONKEY LLC,A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS LLC, LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT NIGHT MONKEY LLC,A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 TO 5O,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-26-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-12-2003

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS LLC, LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIGHT MONKEY LLC,A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $6,075.00 PRINCIPAL, $950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $870.00 INTEREST, $155.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,050.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $155.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NIGHT MONKEY LLC,A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $8,111.61 AS TO DEFENDANT NIGHT MONKEY LLC,A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL AGREEMENTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS LLC, LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
DECLARATION IN LIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS LLC, LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FOCUS LLC, LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED AUG-06-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NIGHT MONKEY LLC,A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
